message:
feat(recorder): add deterministic [from, to) range reindex with replay semantics

Add reindex_range() to ReindexPipeline with exclusive upper bound
semantics: events with from.ordinal <= ordinal < to.ordinal are
indexed exactly once per invocation.

- Add ReindexPipeline::reindex_range() with [from, to) RecorderOffset
- Add ExclusiveOrdinalRange and index_loop_exclusive() for clean
  exclusive-bound iteration
- Add open_cursor_at_ordinal() to RecorderEventReader trait with
  efficient O(1) override in AppendLogEventSource
- Add structured debug! logging with reindex_range, from, to, backend
- Add InMemoryEventReader for backend-neutral parity tests
- 10 new tests: exclusive bounds, empty range, single event, reversed
  bounds, idempotent replay, cross-backend parity, schema filtering,
  batch size validation, ExclusiveOrdinalRange Debug/Clone/Eq
- All 81 tantivy_reindex tests pass

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
